description: Create a 'Greatest Hits' re-release for the artist 'Iron Maiden' (ArtistId 90) in the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db). Identify the top 10 best-selling tracks for Iron Maiden based on total quantity in invoice_items and create a new album titled 'Iron Maiden: Remastered Classics'. For each of these top 10 tracks, create a new track record linked to the new album with the name suffixed by ' (Remastered)', a UnitPrice of 1.29, and all other fields (Composer, Milliseconds, Bytes, GenreId, MediaTypeId) matching the original track. Export a CSV manifest of the new tracks including TrackId, Name, and UnitPrice to /home/ga/Documents/exports/new_release_manifest.csv and save the SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/remaster_release.sql.
